entry.title: Re: Public-Sales-Billing form -txt n' logo-What is the ri...
entry.content:
Hi  EduardoPaim

Please check the Setup Guide for 1LQ - page 51 

https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-013/2408/SolP/1LQ?region=US

You set the Master form template in the configuration option Define Rules for Determination of Master Form Template. You can check there which form is in use.

 

thank you

Jerry

entry.title: Re: HTTPS Message Server Port Enabling for ECC (Multiple...
entry.content: Thanks for providing the information. Also please update step how to create the "SAPSSLS.pse" for ASCSxx instance on which Message Server is running.

entry.title: Re: What's on Your SAP Community Wish List?
entry.content:
i dont see the induction but i'm glad to say "represent!" 

how does it feel to be the most west part of the SAP world? i constantly in EST 😉

entry.title: Re: Launch Excel SAC Add-In file from SAC folder
entry.content:
@MelCalucin 

Currently you can only launch Excel templates from Excel interface by browsing the location on the tenant. So if you sign in to Excel SAC and go Open>Browse the tenant folder where Excel files were saved, this will launch the excel report. But if you do the other way round and go to the SAC tenant folder and click on the Excel file, it will get downloaded as excel and then you have to open it and logon to it for further use. Option to directly launch the Excel files from SAC stories is a feature planned for 2025Q1 as per the roadmap.

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Moving/Rolling averages - SAC, Lumira, Eclipse Query...
entry.content:
Hi Felix,

This should be a breeze to implement is SAC, if use the dynamic date range filter functionality. First create  calculated measure for your KPI if its not coming from source and create a page filter on the page with the calculated KPI using the date dimension, then set the dynamic date range to 7, 30, 90  and 360 days to date as multiple options to choose on your page. If you havent found a solution yet, hope this helps.

Regards

Bolaji

entry.title: Re: Launch Excel SAC Add-In file from SAC folder
entry.content:
Hi Nikhil (@n1kh1l),

So I opened the Excel app (not the web online one) and then signed into SAC.  When I clicked on Open and selected the Excel SAC Add-In file "TEST".  It started another Excel session with the file name Book2 and not "TEST" but having the content of the file "TEST".   This new Excel session also was not signed into SAC.  I had to sign in again to have the Excel add-in file refresh its data.   Is this the same experience you're getting?

Thanks.

Regards,

Mel Calucin

entry.title: Re: Published In-app Help and Guided Tours not visible in...
entry.content:
Hi Emily,

The only thing I can think of is that your users are not being authenticated and SAP Companion is displaying standard Simulations so doesn't require authentication.  Have you implemented the following parameter:

readCatalogue=false

If so, turn it off and see if that resolves your issue.  If you haven't implemented that parameter, raise a support ticket using the Component ID KM-SEN-CMP and get support involved.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Insights Needed: Managing Complex Relationships with...
entry.content: Hello @Xavier, Thank you for your feedback. This is also what I suggested to my client: combining the second hierarchy with the new Route Map functionality. However, the client is asking many questions to ensure feasibility and is requesting detailed technical explanations on how to manage the following links in SuccessFactors: Valideur_Final_Rémunération_Classes_Groupe_A: Final approver for Group A or a class. Valideur_Final_Rémunération_Groupes_B_C: Final approver for Groups B or C. Manager_Rémunération_Classes_Groupe_A: Submitter for Group A or a class. Manager_Rémunération_Groupes_B_C: Submitter for Groups B or C. RH_Rémunération_Classes_Groupe_A: HR monitor for Group A or a class. RH_Rémunération_Groupes_B_C: HR monitor for Groups B or C. It is worth mentioning that some employees involved might not belong to the main company but could be part of a subsidiary. Could you please help me provide a detailed technical explanation of how these roles and links can be managed in SuccessFactors? Thank you in advance for your support.

entry.title: Re: Enable Now as ChatBot resource
entry.content:
Hi Marie,

Sorry, I don't know how to configure you Chatbot but every Enable Now object has a unique URL so is you can use that information to configure your Chatbot then you are good to go.  To access that unique URL:

1. Open Manager and open the Workarea containing the content that is to be linked into your Chatbot
2. Click on the down arrow beside the All Content link and select Published (top, right corner)
3. Click on a content object.  The Start Link attribute contains the unique URL that can be used to access that content object

Hope that helps.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Use SAP BW query conditions to create measure-based filters in SAC stories (Live Connection)
entry.content:
Introduction

Last week, I had insightful discussions with colleagues and a customer using SAC live on top of SAP BW/4HANA. The topic was whether conditions from SAP BW queries could be leveraged to create measure-based filters in SAP Analytics Cloud stories based on live models. That conversation inspired this blog.

📌Highlights in the blog:
• Learn about SAP BW conditions and how SAC supports them
• A step-by-step guide to creating conditions in SAP BW queries
• How to make the process dynamic with variables
• Using those variables in SAC story filters
• Leveraging those variables for slider filters in SAC

Let's start 

In one of my recent blog posts, I presented a method for creating a What-If Simulation in an SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) Story using an SAC Live Model (with SAP BW/4HANA as an example). For more details, please refer to the relevant blog here: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/what-if-simulation-in-a-sac-story-based-on-a-sac-live-model-e-g-sap-bw/bc-p/13525488

If you want to see how this looks when you follow the steps outlined in the mentioned blog, please watch this sneak peek:

While using acquired data, you can create measure-based filters in SAP Analytics Cloud; however, this is currently not available when using a live connection with SAP BW as the data source. Of course, you can use scripting to filter a specific table or chart, but I prefer a solution that works across all SAP Analytics Cloud stories by modifying the underlying SAP BW Query just once. If there is a need to have this functionality only in a few SAC dashboards, you can just follow my way.

We will leverage an SAP BW Query condition combined with an SAP BW Query variable, making the condition much more flexible and reusable in various scenarios. In other words, we will create a single formula variable on the SAP BW side that can be used universally. The good news is that it’s simpler than it sounds!🙂

Now let's start

The following steps provide a general explanation of what conditions are. We will first learn the basics. Later, we will explore how to leverage some 'flexibility' in their usage - what is the main purpose of this blog.

First, we need an SAP BW Query which holds some measures (key figures) and characteristics (dimensions).
And then we will add a condition to this SAP BW query. Let's start first with the condition itself and what it does. Generally speaking, you can define conditions for queries so that you can hide irrelevant figures. The definition of this condition happens directly in the SAP BW Query. 

But what is a condition in an SAP BW Query? To improve the efficiency of data analysis, you can formulate conditions. In the results area of the query, the data is filtered according to the conditions so that only the part of the results area that you are interested in is displayed.

If you apply conditions to a query, you are not changing any figures; you are just hiding the numbers that are not relevant for you. Conditions therefore have no effect on the values displayed in the results rows. The results row of a query with an active condition is the same as the results row of a query without this condition.

You can define multiple conditions for a query. Conditions are evaluated independently of each other. The result set is therefore independent of the evaluation sequence. The result is the intersection of the individual conditions. Multiple conditions are linked logically with AND. A characteristic value is only displayed when it fulfills all (active) conditions of the query (seeLinking Two Conditions: Bottom 2 Revenue and Invoiced Quantity > 100,000,000).

You can choose from the following operators for threshold value conditions:

  • = Equal To
  • <> Not Equal To
  • > Greater Than
  • >= Greater Than or Equal To
  • < Less Than
  • <= Less Than or Equal To
  • [] Between
  • ][ Not Between

The values for these operators must be floating point numbers. For the operators [] Between and ][ Not Between, you must enter a value range, that is, an upper and a lower threshold value.

You can choose from the following operators for ranked list conditions:

  • Top N
  • Top %
  • Top Total
  • Bottom N
  • Bottom %
  • Bottom Total

We will go with the "> Greater Than" condition in our example. It acts like a "Threshold Value Condition": An entry is filtered independently of the other entries if its reference value has a specific relationship to a comparison value. For example, an entry is not displayed if its reference value exceeds or is less than a specific threshold value (for example, gross revenue > 500000).

SAP Analytics Cloud can handle conditions originating from SAP BW Queries. If a specific condition from a SAP BW Query is used across multiple live models or if several SAP Analytics Cloud stories rely on a live model built on top of a SAP BW Query with a condition, they can all utilize it. This eliminates the need to create multiple conditions. But that's a different story.

Let's start with a SAP BW Query with some key figures (measures). We can make the conditions flexible, but I will make it simple so anyone can follow. In this case, lets focus on the "Gross Margin" where we want to see only values above 100000. We will click on the "Conditions" tab to proceed.

In the next screen we will see that there is no condition available. Let's create one. In the conditions tab perform a right-click and select "New Condition"':

Now click on "Add".


We will select a key figure (measure), in our example the "Gross Margin", and will select the Comparison Operator "GreaterThan".

Now we need a value. I will use "100000" and hit "OK".

Our condition in the BW Query is ready now. I have also added a description. If I save the SAP BW Query, we can continue.

We can do much more here, but let's focus on the main topic. Before introducing flexibility, we need to understand what happens in SAP Analytics Cloud (or in other SAP BI clients, such as SAP Analysis for Microsoft Office or the SAC Add-in for MS Excel)

Now, if I build a SAP Analytics Cloud live model on top of this SAP BW Query, I can create my SAC story and will be able to activate or deactivate this condition in the tables.....

....or charts that use this SAC live model. In the following chart the condition is active.

This is how it looks when the condition is inactive:

The following short animation demonstrates this nice interaction which works automatically plug & play as SAP Analytics Cloud just leverage the features coming from the SAP BW Query. When the condition is enabled, only values for the Gross Margin above 100K are displayed. When the condition is disabled, all values for the Gross Margin are visible.

So far so good, but now bring some flexibility into this condition on SAP BW Query and on SAP Analytics Cloud side to get our measure based filter.

Bring flexibility into the process and get our measure based filter

Let's return to the condition in our SAP BW Query to make a change. We go to the conditions tab and click on "Edit" next to the condition.

Next to the value field, you will notice a small symbol, which is the standard symbol for variables in SAP BW Queries. Just click on it.


Clicking on this symbol opens a selection screen where you can choose from the available variables.
I have already created a "formula variable" which will help us but how we can create our own variable?

To create your own, we need to do this directly at the SAP BW Query level. This can be done in various places. Typically, you need to right-click on the SAP BW Query and select "Variable". You will also notice the symbol we already saw in the SAP BW Query.

In the next window enter a name (usually it starts with Z or whatever name space is allowed in your system) and a description. Follow now with the variable type. THIS IS NOW IMPORTANT: You must select "FORMULA" here as we need a formula variable which stores a number (our threshold for the Gross Margin). If you are done, click on "finish".

Now we have our formula variable ready to use. Let's return to our SAP BW Query.
Navigate to the "Conditions" tab, open the condition by selecting "Edit", choose the newly created condition, and click "OK".

If you now run the SAC story using this SAP BW Query, you will notice a new prompt. This is our newly created SAP BW variable. Currently, it defaults to a value of '0.' Of course, within the variable settings, you can also define a default value (e.g., 250,000), but I did not set one. This is what it looks like:

In my example I have entered "200000" and if I hit "Set" I can see the result.
Now I can only see values above 200000. 

But how we can add this as a filter into the story?

If you followed my SAP Analytics Cloud Live Blog ( https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/analyse-your-data-live-with-sap-analytics-cloud-on-top-of-sap-bw-4hana-sap/ba-p/13933035 ), you will know that we can use variables from the SAP BW as Query in the filter dialog.

Let's see how this works. We open our SAC Story in the "edit" mode. In the next step we activate the "Filter Panel"

Make sure that you select the right SAP Analytics Cloud live model. 
After that, select the screen with the "Variables".

In the last step, select your variable you have created in the SAP BW Query and which we saw also in the variable prompt.

Now save the SAC Story and run it in the view mode. You will now notice the variable from the SAP BW Query, directly in the filter panel of the story. We can also show all other variables there but let's focus on the main topic of the blog again.

Now we can enter a value and see what happens on the screen. If I enter 200000, I will only see all Gross Margin values above this value:
If I enter 100000, I will only see all Gross Margin values above this value:

The following animation shows how this works.

But what about more flexibility? What if we use a slider? Let's see how we can achieve this.
First we need a script variable which should store the value for our threshold.

Let's give it a name and a description. We need to select "number" as type.

Finally we click on "Done" and leave this window.
In the next step we include a slider into our SAC Story.

I set the background of the slider to white and used the following settings.
Make sure that you select the right variable coming from the SAP BW Query and the right Script Variable.
Some selections are optional.

Close the Designer on the right side and let's add a button. 

If needed add a text and a tool tip in the settings of the button.

Now let's add a little bit scripting to the button.

I will use this peace of code:

Chart_C1.getDataSource().setVariableValue("ZCONDITIONADEM",MyTresholdSAC);
Table_C1.getDataSource().setVariableValue("ZCONDITIONADEM",MyTresholdSAC);

Description of the used ID's:

There is no need to write down all the ID's.
The ID's from the charts & tables you will get from the settings of each widget.
Also the SAP BW Variable and the Script Variable can be easily selected. 
Just hit the "STRG" and "SPACE" keys on your keyboard.

And now we are done. Let's see what happens.
If I set the threshold to 20000 and hit the filter button it will filter my Gross Margin.

You can change the maximum value in the settings of the slide. I did it and changed it to 250000.
The following animation shows a few slides and clicks.

I’m quite sure you can achieve all of this using scripting in the SAC story, and there are other methods available depending on the data source. However, in this case, I wanted to demonstrate a flexible approach when using SAP BW as the data source, especially if there’s a need for a measure filter like this based on a live model. While there is currently an influence request to make this functionality native in SAC available for live models, this workaround is available today.

I also believe there is room for optimization. The goal here is simply to show what is possible with minimal effort. Normally, everything I’ve demonstrated in this blog can be implemented in a very short time. You might need assistance from an SAP BW Query expert, but once the SAP BW Query is ready, the rest is quite straightforward.

The blog showcases only two filtering methods, but of course, there are more (e.g. range filters, other filter types).🙂

I hope you enjoyed this blog! 

Best regards.

Adem

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere: OData Connector for PowerBi
entry.content:
Hello,  @gustavokath,
Is there any updated information on how to consume Analytic models in Power BI?

Best regards

entry.title: Why PEO in VEMP is creating alternative 02 instead of alternative 01
entry.content:
This question is specific to PEO, enabled in S4 HANA 2022 SP 2023/02. During the EBOM to MBOM handover in VEMP, an alternative 02 was created instead of version 2 as the EBOM has been changed and created with version 2 using the Bill Of Material Fiori app, and I created a new change record and launched VEMP form planning scope, applied changes and save and exit planning.  Please see the attached screenshots.

Moreover, in the course S4280e, in one of the demos(Implement Engineering Changes, Execute the Updated Production Order), I can see that the system is giving the warning "Any changes of BOM will create a new version of BOM after save" (screenshot attached). Please advise what triggers to create alternative 2 instead of version 2.

entry.title: #service document Cannot find customer group 1-5 in service order
entry.content:
Hi expert,

I cannot find customer group1-5 in the service order. But I can see these fields in the service order item CDS view. How can I enter these fields in the service order?

entry.title: Re: Why is Hungarian Notation Harmful?
entry.content:
What Stops Us From Ditching HN?
In many cases it's a local Team Leader or so called Code of Conduct prepared in the good all days of FORMS and SAPScript that enforces HN. Honestly in many cases I do not feel motivated enough to change mindset of some people hence I stick to their rules. And I have the same feelings about <FS> - it makes my eyes bleed.

entry.title: Re: Data Services job scheduler not running when specifyi...
entry.content:
We ran into the same problem and tried a community solution works.

Solution:

1. go into the scheduler folder on your server Win server will be in C:\ProgramData\SAP BusinessObjects\Data Services\log\{Job Server}\Schedules\{local job server user}

2. append the end of the txt file of the scheduler with: -Q"LOCAL_REPO_SERVER_NAME"

Referenced solution:

Solved: SAP Data Services Job Scheduler is not working not... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Cloud PrivateEditionとPublicEditionにおける使用可能モジュール/機能の比較
entry.content:
その活動の背景を付け加えていただくと、コミュニティーメンバーからいいアドバイスができると思います。
なぜ、比較表が必要なのか？比較表があると、その先に何が起こるのか？
どの範囲で、またどのレベルで必要なのかもサンプルがあると回答しやすいと思います。

entry.title: Re: RCM Autoposting after job req updates
entry.content: Hello Experts,

entry.title: Deploying a Fiori App that consumes an S/4HANA Cloud API into SAP S/4HANA Cloud launchpad
entry.content:
Hello,

Here are the requirements:

  • Develop a Fiori application that consumes a standard SAP API.
  • Deploy the application to the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Launchpad.

For API consumption, I used a destination configured through a BTP service instance for SAP S/4HANA Cloud extensibility. The application successfully consumes the API locally.

For deployment, when I execute the command npm run deploy in the terminal, I encounter the following errors:

N.B.: When I create an application that does not consume any API, the deployment is successful.

My question is:

  • Is there a way to deploy this application to the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Fiori Launchpad?
  • If not, is there an alternative that would allow me to meet my requirements?

Best regards,

Hamza EL MOUAFIK

entry.title: This online service is currently not available. please reach out to your SAP Representative.
entry.content:
Unable to terminate contract online on SAP for Me>Finance & Legal Dashboard.

error message:

This online service is currently not available. please reach out to your SAP Representative.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: This online service is currently not available. pleas...
entry.content:
With the newly designed Cloud tab in Finance & Legal dashboard within SAP for Me, Customers can now initiate and manage Full Cloud Contract Terminations (covering all items on the order form) using the "Terminate Contract" option under the new "Manage Contract".

If a termination request is outside the available window, has an ongoing negotiation, termination, or if the deal type is out of scope, a message will appear prompting the user to contact the SAP Representative to process the termination request.

KBA 3259711 - Who to contact at SAP for contract and/or licensing questions - SAP for Me

3468089 - How to terminate cloud contracts/orders or retract the termination in Finance & Legal Dashboard > Cloud - SAP for Me - SAP for Me

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Cloud PrivateEditionとPublicEditionにおける使用可能モジュール/機能の比較
entry.content:
@masa_139 

こんにちは。

アドバイスありがとうございます。

元投稿に返信する形で付け加えようと思います。

SAPに携わって日が浅いため、もし目に止まった際には今後ともご指導のほどよろしくお願いいたします。

よろしくお願いいたします。

entry.title: Stored Procedure Notification
entry.content:
Hi

  I want Stored Procedure Notification in HANA if A/p Invoice is copied to Credit Note then Unit Price of line items should be same.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Cancelling a backup session in HANA
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We have HANA databases running in our production environment and the database backups are running in the Cohesity(3rd party). Sometimes we are observing the DB backups that going to hung status, during this time we are trying to cancel the hung backup from both HANA DB side and from Cohesity. We will follow the SAP note "2827950 - How-To: Cancel Hanging Backup on SAP HANA"  , most of the times that options which SAP has provided in note will work. And only restart is option to cancel the hung backup.  

In this situation, when the issue occurs in production DB, it is impossible restart the production DB during the business days. If we don't restart the DB the backup's will not happen in production system. Could you please check and help us to find a alternative solution to cancel the backup without DB restart.

DB version: 2.00.072


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Cancelling a backup session in HANA
entry.content:
Dear customer,

To resolve the issue you are facing, you can also try terminating the backup session by referring to KBA 2092196 - How-To: Terminating Sessions in SAP HANA. 
However, it is possible that none of the approaches mentioned in the article will work if you have already executed the 'BACKUP CANCEL' command and the backup session is still active. 
If you encounter this situation, the only option available is to restart the HANA database as described also in KBA 3423178 - How can a hanging backup session be canceled with the Alert-ID: 65 for long-running backups?. 

If you come across this issue, it is important to collect runtimedumps (three pieces with a 1-minute interval as mentioned in note 1813020) while the issue is occurring. 
These runtimedumps will help us analyze the problem and provide you with the root cause and resolution to prevent the HANA database from encountering the same situation again. 

Additionally, I strongly recommend keeping the HANA database updated to the latest revision whenever possible. 
Considering that the latest revisions are 2.00.059.15 (SPS05)/2.00.079.01 (SPS07)/2.00.080 (SPS08), the current HANA revision is quite outdated for a production system. 
Please consider upgrading the HANA database as soon as possible to minimize potential risks associated with this revision.

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Emails not going
entry.content:
Hi

  When a user is trying to send Email it is not going. When Email is sent through manager ID then only email goes.

I am using Hana

Thanks

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Cloud PrivateEditionとPublicEditionにおける使用可能モジュール/機能の比較
entry.content:
▪この活動の背景

 

現在、S/4HANA Cloudの社内環境(学習用)を構築する事前準備を行っており、
下記投稿などを確認し、各Editionの違いを比較検討している段階です。
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/difference-between-sap-s-4hana-public-vs-private-edition-rise-with-sap/ba-p/13546250

今一番知りたい情報としては、各Editionにおいてどのモジュールが使用できて、どのモジュールが使用できないのかを確認したいと考えています。
しかし、調査しても使用できるモジュールが明確に把握できるようなサイト、記事、投稿は探し出すことが出来ていない状況です。

クリティカルな情報やそれに近しい情報、またはそれらの調べ方についてアドバイス頂けると大変助かります。
※添付画像のような比較を想定しております。

拙い投稿で大変恐縮ですが、有識者の方々のお力添えをお願いできればと存じます。
よろしくお願いいたします。

entry.title: Re: Insights Needed: Managing Complex Relationships with...
entry.content:
Hi @ALAE1 

As long as there is a value in EC or somewhere (by that I mean outside SuccessFactors) that can help identify who is in each group, you can configure Role Based Permissions > Executive Review accordingly.

We can build dynamic groups or static groups (upload by userId) in Manage Permission Groups in RBP. I'm not sure what else you need except maybe to show the customer some examples of each of these.

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content: Hi @julieplummer20, Thank you very much to you and your team for all the hard work on this Docker image. It's terrific to have these testing systems for trying new things. I have a question: is the SAP Cloud Connector pre-installed in the image? If not, is it possible to install it? Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Temporary servers for upgrade projects in S/4HANA Cloud private edition
entry.content:
Hi, all

We are approaching the time when we need to upgrade older version of S/4HANA, and we are considering the best approach.

We understand the scope of services provided by ECS and CAS, but we would like to know about the costs and procedures related to the temporary servers(sandbox system) needed during the upgrade project.

  1. If we subscribe to CAS and proceed with the project, does the CAS package include the provision of temporary servers?
  2. If we proceed with the project by requesting ECS services only, how do we request temporary servers? Additionally, will there be separate charges for the temporary server usage?

Best Regards,

entry.title: How to create many approvers in workflow that is created by SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi all,

I would like to create the Approval process with many approvers in the workflow that is created by SAP Build Process Automation.

The Approval process I would like to get is that

if price > 100, go to Approver A

else if price >= 100 <= 300, go to Approver A, if Approver A approved, go to Approver B

else if price > 300, go to Approver C

So, the corresponding approval request should be sent to the corresponding Approver's Inbox only and other approvers should not see it.

 

For now, I created all approver users under my BTP account's Security > Users.

So, all approver users share to use only one Inbox and all approval requests sent from Workflow of SAP Build Process Automation can be able to see by all approvers.

 

Is it possible to show the corresponding request only for the corresponding approver by creating users like this?

If yes, which step I need to add to get the requirement?

(or)

If not, could you please guide me how can I get this kind of Approval process?

 

Thank you.

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

entry.title: Re: Question regarding Data Source Integration in Content Form Templates
entry.content:
Hi Prasanth @PrasanthPadmanabhan 

Thank you for your response. Yes, that's the information that I want, could you provide more details about it?
I understood that released CDS views can be output to forms.

As additional questions:
1. Is it possible to output custom business objects (custom tables) to forms as well?
2. When outputting data to forms, is the process correct where data flows from CDS views/tables through custom logic to custom fields in transaction documents? In other words, if the form output application doesn't support custom fields/custom logic, is my understanding correct that such implementation would be impossible?
3. If there are other methods to output fields not present in standard form data sources to forms, please let me know.

BR,
K

entry.title: Re: Update Eligibility Rule after Variable Pay form has b...
entry.content:
Hi @rebeccanussba 

I just tested it and you are correct there is no checkbox in VP (unlike Compensation) that would allow us to apply eligibility changes made through the Manager Eligibility Rule so I also wasn't able to grey out just one column at the summary level in my test case.

I would assume it's never been supported but will ping our Product team tomorrow.

The only alternative I can think of would be to use the global eligibility rule to grey out the whole user.

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Facing issue while Decoding Base64 Encoded PDF in CPI
entry.content:
Hi Arvik,
Can you please paste some sample payload that is being passed to the Base64 Decoder in Integration Suite ?

entry.title: Re: #CoE#BUMA - Item price has not changed in the catalog...
entry.content:
Hi Dave,

Thank you for your prompt response.

We noticed that whenever we purchase items through external catalogue then whenever there is an assigned Source of supply, we encountered this kind of error.

Does this mean that user must not add a Source of supply whenever they purchase items from catalog?

Regards!

John

entry.title: Unable to see Manage Departments in User Management
entry.content:
Hi SAP,


I am unable to see "Manage Departments" in User Management even though my S-User ID is an Administrator.


Please help to check. 
Thank you.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Unable to see Manage Departments in User Management
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

To locate Manage Departments, please follow the steps below:

  1. Go to User Management
  2. Click Manage Services top right.
  3. In the drop-down choose Manage Departments.
  • Click + to add a new department. Type the department name and click Save.
  • Click the red trash can icon next to the department you wish to delete (then click OK to finalize).
  • Click edit (pencil icon) to edit an existing entry and click Save.

If you wish to Manage (add/remove) existing departments for S-users, follow these steps:

  1. In User Management, click the Users tab
  2. Select the S-user(s) you wish to maintain
  3. Click Change Department at the top of the Users list
  4. The Change Department screen will pop up
  • Click a Department in the list to assign it, then click the Assign confirmation button
  • Click Remove Department to delete the assigned department and click the Remove confirmation button

For more detailed information, please refer to KBA: 2361192 - How to manage department information for S-user IDs - SAP for Me

Hope the above information is helpful to you.

Best regards,
Judy

entry.title: How to change System Role in SAP for Me portal
entry.content:
In sap.me portal the system is shown with System Role "Test". We would like to use this system as "Development" System Role. Are there any changes/restrictions after the System role change to us?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to change System Role in SAP for Me portal
entry.content:
Can the System Type be changed for existing systems?

Please follow the Best Practices articles when editing existing systems:
KBA 2531837 – Best practices of editing SAP Business Suite systems and license keys - SAP for Me

What types of changes should not (or cannot) be made to an existing systems or license keys?
If you need to change any of the following, you must create a new system with new license keys in the License Keys application. So in cases where you have a new deployment of the software, you should create a new system instead of editing an existing system. Please do not edit an existing system or license key for the following types of changes:

  • Product Name and/or Version changed  
  • Operating System changed
  • System Type or Development Phase changed (e.g. License Type changes from Test, Development, Production)
  • Database changed - Note: As mentioned above, only change the database for an existing system if all license keys under that system are to be changed to the new database. If you plan to use the old database for some systems and new data for others, you should create separate systems for each database. 
  • 3-character System ID cannot be changed (a new system needs to be created)


KBA 2446681 - Best practices of updating BOBJ license keys & system data - SAP for Me

  • System type (production, development, test) can be changed but changing the system type by editing an existing system, could have the unintended consequences of overdrawing your license entitlement. This is why we recommend creating a new system when the system type changes.

entry.title: Re: Standard AR AP aging report APP
entry.content:
Dear,

C_ARJrnlEntrItmAgingGrid can be published as a multi-dimensional report to view customers aging

You can use Fiori App View Browser to show content, publish it as a Fiori app, and add it to a catalogue.

entry.title: Re: #Deloitte#COE- BAdI Logic to substitute a cost center...
entry.content:
Dear

Please try this config (a.k.a OKB9 in OP version) ID 102639 Manage Default Account Assignments

perhaps you want to set up FX realized gain or loss G/L accounts posted to accounting cost center.

 

Regards,

Sen

entry.title: Cannot use 'BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CHAGE'
entry.content:
After SAP upgrade, using 'BAPI-OUTB_DELIVERY_CAGE' cannot change the actual GI date.

When TIMETYPE="WSHDRWADTI", the Actual GI date cannot be changed

It can be changed before upgrading

entry.title: Introducing Key Performance Indicator (KPI) Monitoring in PP/DS for SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Background

SAP S/4HANA Manufacturing for planning and scheduling (PP/DS) capability is used to create procurement proposals for in-house production or external procurement to cover product requirements and to optimize and plan the resource schedule and the order dates/times in detail. PP/DS helps a Production Planner to reduce the lead times, to increase on-time delivery performance, or to increase the throughput of products and reduce the stock costs.

However, how would the Production Planner know whether their production plan is really helping them achieve their goals or not?

Depending on the complexity of the business, a production planner could be dealing with hundreds of resources, thousands of products, and thousands of partners and customers. Monitoring the Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) for complex production plans is critical to ensure that the production plan is feasible and is aligned with business goals.

 

Introduction

As part of the SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) release 2024.Q4, a new Business Content Package for Line of Business (LoB) titled "Production Planning and Detailed Scheduling" is released. This Business Content Package includes 4 stories -

  • Order Details
  • Order Operations
  • Pegging Relationships (Order to Demand)
  • Resource Capacity

The above SAC stories need a live data connection to SAP S/4HANA 2023 system. The four Analytical Queries released as part of SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS2 serve as the data source for these stories

Once you have successfully created the connection between your SAC tenant and your SAP S/4HANA system, the SAC stories would display the KPIs and charts based on your data.

 

SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) stories

Order Details

The SAP PP/DS: KPI Monitoring - Order Details story has an Overview and a Details page, and displays important performance indicators about your orders, such as the:

  • number of orders
  • number of delayed orders
  • lead, processing, queue, setup, and wait time
  • number of schedule lines
  • confirmed, original, receipt, scrap, and total quantity

Figure 1: Order Details - OverviewFigure 2: Order Details - Details

This story also links to and from the Order Operations and Pegging Relationships (Order to Demand) stories.

Order Operations

The SAP PP/DS: KPI Monitoring - Order Operations story has an Overview page and displays important performance indicators about the operations of your orders, such as the:

  • number of operations
  • number of sub operations
  • gross operation duration
  • net operation duration

Figure 3: Order Operations - Overview

This story also links to and from the Order Details and Resource Capacity stories.

Pegging Relationships (Order to Demand)

The SAP PP/DS: KPI Monitoring - Pegging Relationships (Order to Demand) story has an Overview and a Details page, and displays important performance indicators about your orders and their pegging relationships, such as the:

  • service level percentage
  • maximum earliness and lateness time
  • total buffer time
  • early, on-time, delayed, and total relationships count
  • requirement quantity

Figure 4: Pegging Relationships (Order to Demand) - OverviewFigure 5: Pegging Relationships (Order to Demand) - Details

This story also links to and from the Order Details story.

Resource Capacity

The SAP PP/DS: KPI Monitoring - Resource Capacity story has an Overview and a Details page, and displays important performance indicators about your resources, such as the:

  • number of overloaded resources
  • capacity utilization
  • capacity required for setup, teardown, production, and queue

Figure 6: Resource Capacity - OverviewFigure 7: Resource Capacity - Details

This story also links to and from the Order Operations story.

 

Wrapping Up

The SAC stories for KPI Monitoring in PP/DS can be used to track and monitor the KPIs based on your current production plan. You can use these SAC stories "as is", or by fine-tuning them or by using them as reference to create your own SAC stories. 

Please feel free to share your feedback and comments.

P.S.: Refer SAP Note 3495936 - Restrictions and Implementation Recommendations for Analytics in PP/DS on SAP S/4HANA 2023 to ensure all the pre-requisites are maintained in your SAP S/4HANA system.

entry.title: Analytical Insights in Joule (powered by SAC), Controlled release in Q1 2025
entry.content:
Introduction

We’re excited to announce Analytical Insights in Joule, powered by SAP Analytics Cloud with the upcoming QRC1.2025 release of SAP Analytics Cloud. This post provides an overview of the capability, its current scope, future directions, prerequisites, and release plans.

Analytics Insights in Joule – Overview and Functionality

What are Analytical Insights in Joule?

Today, Joule can be enabled in many SAP applications like SuccessFactors, S4HANA etc. In case you are not aware and want to get started with Joule, refer this page.

If you have Joule already enabled in any of your SAP applications, then analytical capability in Joule, powered by SAP Analytics Cloud, allows business users to explore their data and gain insights into your business, in a natural, conversational experience. Using familiar business terms, simply ask your question, and Joule will instantly provide answers as simple charts and metrics.

Joule works with data from models that are indexed by the Just Ask feature of SAP Analytics Cloud. This means that the administrator for Just Ask in the SAP Analytics Cloud tenant in your SAP BTP landscape determines what models, and therefore data, are available to in Joule once the analytical capability is enabled.

What is in the controlled release? (incl. limitations)

In the first release of SAP Analytics Cloud and Joule integration, any user who has access to Joule and has a valid user in SAP Analytics enterprise tenant can access this capability in Joule.  Further, your analytical universe in SAP analytics cloud can only consist of Acquired/Imported SAC models specifically enabled by user.

With the first release, you will be able to realize the following benefits:

  • Ask analytical questions naturally in your language via Joule (which can soon be enabled in your cloud application, if not already is)
  • You don’t have to login to SAC to get analytical insights, get them from the context of your business application

Note the following limitations exist during controlled release. We will try to lift them as soon as possible in the upcoming releases:

  • Joule itself cannot yet be enabled in SAC enterprise tenant (this is work in progress and you can expect it  soon).
  • Currently, only acquired (imported) models are supported. No live data models are supported.
  • Analytical Insights can only be metrices and charts.
  • The analytical capability is only supported when the Joule client interface is in U.S. English.
  • Google Chrome and New Microsoft Edge browsers are supported.

Infrastructure & Prerequisites

What are the prerequisites to access this capability?

Following are the set of pre-requisites for this capability to be available:

  • You should have access to Joule in one or more of SAP applications
  • You should have SAP analytics cloud in your landscape
  • A user can access this capability only if has a valid user in SAP Analytics Cloud

Controlled release & Way forward

Who can participate in the Controlled Release?

You must be a customer of both SAP Analytics Cloud and any of SAP cloud application that has Joule enabled. Your SAP analytics cloud tenant must be running in Cloud Foundry, NEO landscape is not planned to be supported.

How can I sign up?

Registration page is available on Customer Influence Portal.

When can I expect general availability?

General availability is planned for QRC2.2025. Note that availability only applies to SAP Analytics Cloud tenants running on Cloud Foundry.

Conclusion

We are looking forward to welcoming customers to this controlled release and to make this capability available to more and more customers in 2025. We shall deliver additional functionality unlocking more of the potential of this incredibly powerful integration.

entry.title: SAP-Business-One WebClientApiExtensions Problems
entry.content:
Hi,

i am testing the SAP-Business-One Web-Client. My SBO-Version is:

I have reproduced the Example Adding a Click-Button...

But here i am running into little trouble.

E.g. the Context-Function Preview (Web Client) does not work, also the context Menu for mta.yaml is not correct.

I have tested with node -Version: v14.16.1 and also with the last stable node-Version.

any help would be appeciated.

kind Regards,
Matthias Lakämper

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/developing-extensions-for-sap-business-one-and-the-web-client/customizing-sap-business-one-web-client-views-using-ui-api-extension

entry.title: Delivery based EWM -PP Integration,STO's and Transfer posting doc's are not created in EWM with MF60
entry.content:
Hi Guru's ,WIth Delivery based EWM PP integration, in MF60, selected EWM pick parts release parts,and created replenishment proposals and did staged the replenishment elements for a prodcution order.

In EWM ,  i couldn't able to see any transfer posting doc's or STO , doc's .

Am i missing any config setting on WM staging in S4 . ?? For info, adequate stock is there in the Final bins with F2 . DEL_PROD is the PSA which is mapped to PROD Sloc .Created all EWM the configs. But still couldn't able to generate the replenishment doc's in EWM.

 

Please help me in this regard.

Attached is the screen shots for the same.

B regards,

Viswanath.

MF60:

Couldn't able see any log's in SLG1.

entry.title: How to get the voucher codes to get discount for certification
entry.content: How to get voucher to get discounts on certification programs

entry.title: sap fiori element bust indicator in table column
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
I have a fiori element page that is developed using CAP, i have column named status. How do i display busy indicator only this column based on the rows selected by the user

I have created a new action, which has below code in extension, Also is there to update the status without pressing go item, I am aware that side effects can be used for actions, but I am using function import

const oModel = oEvent.getModel();
            for (const currentContext of aSelectedContexts) {
                const oContext = currentContext;
                const oAction = oModel.bindContext("/process_data(...)", oContext);
                oAction.setParameter("ID", oContext.getObject().ID);
                oAction.invoke()
            }
            MessageToast.show("Posting of MIRO for selected items started");

entry.title: Re: Launch Excel SAC Add-In file from SAC folder
entry.content: MelCalucin, that's the current behavior due the limitation from Microsoft.

entry.title: How to perform foreign currency valuation using functional currency for selected vendor or customers
entry.content:
In the "Perform Foreign Currency Valuation" tile, valuation posting is based on company code currency. Notice that there is Advanced Foreign Currency Valuations using "Schedule General Ledger Jobs" tile to perform valuation on functional currency (Perform Foreign Currency Valuation with the new Advanced Valuations in SAP S/4HANA Cloud). However, it doesn't allow users to select specific vendors or customers, meaning that all AR and AP items will be included in foreign currency valuation posting.

May I check how to cater both requirements?

  1. use functional currency for foreign currency valuation
  2. allow users to select specific vendors or customers for foreign currency valuation

entry.title: Re: Excel Upload using RAP: Part -3
entry.content:
Hi,

I have successfully run the upload screen but after I clicked upload or dropped excel file, I got an error on event onUploadSetComplete. It looks like the oFileUploader.getItem[](0) does not have any record on it. Really appreciate if anyone can help. Thanks

entry.title: Re: Launch Excel SAC Add-In file from SAC folder
entry.content: Yes that's the current behavior unfortunately that the saved workbook always opens as a new workbook without sign in and you have to logon to use the template.

entry.title: Invoices in Business Network failing incorrectly
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are implementing Ariba Invoice Management solution for a Non-SAP ERP, as part of this, after the realm baseline, we started creating test transactions from Ariba Invoice Management (AIM) to network (Non-PO Invoices) and were able to validate only for a couple of invoices that it all went fine (from AIM to Network). But after those couple of non-po invoices any non-po invoice we create is getting rejected at Network with the error - "Invoice could not be created from InvoiceDetailRequest. Reason = Duplicate invoice number." We tried creating multiple combinations, by replicating the same data as the ones that were successful by changing quantity and amount and copying the existing Non-PO invoices from AIM, but all invoices seems to be getting this error, although there is no duplicate of invoices here, all the invoices have different Invoice Numbers. 

We are trying to raise a support request on this, i want to check in this group if anyone has encountered this error during implementation or support and what steps have been taken to resolve this.

Please note, we don't have CIG in place here, we are creating the invoices from AIM and validating the statuses in Business Network.

Any help on this would be much appreciated.

Thanks,
Velu

entry.title: Re: display fiori elements draft edit status in listreport
entry.content:
Hi,

This should automatically show up in the key column and is likely a bug if it is not seen (we should track via incident then)!

Best Regards,

  Sandeep

entry.title: Plant specific email output
entry.content: I have a requirement where we need to maintain emails IDs plant wise and once the PO is outputted, the email ID for that plant has to be selected.  For eg:  If a vendor has several Salesperson dealing with different plants, and the vendor is a global supplier, then the PO should be sent to the plant specific sales person. Is this possible in SAP output settings

entry.title: Re: #Deloitte#COE- BAdI Logic to substitute a cost center...
entry.content: Dear Sen, we have tried this but the default cost center configuration for the FX account is being overridden by the cost center derived from the source document during posting

entry.title: Re: Issue with Search Functionality in Dynamic Object Car...
entry.content: @ bill_froelich, i am using REST service API, it is a SQL API, sharing the code,{ "Controls": [ { "FilterFeedbackBar": { "ShowAllFilters": false, "_Type": "Control.Type.FilterFeedbackBar" }, "_Type": "Control.Type.SectionedTable", "_Name": "SectionedTable0", "Sections": [ { "Separators": { "TopSectionSeparator": false, "BottomSectionSeparator": true, "HeaderSeparator": true, "FooterSeparator": true, "ControlSeparator": true }, "_Type": "Section.Type.ObjectCardCollection", "Target": "{#Application/#ClientData/ManualSampleDetails}", "_Name": "SectionObjectCardCollection01", "Visible": true, "EmptySection": { "FooterVisible": false, "Style": "objectCardBG" }, "DataPaging": { "ShowLoadingIndicator": false, "PageSize": 50 }, "Card": { "Visible": true, "Title": "{SampleName} {Space} {Status}", "Subhead": " Date Received From \n {Date} {ReceivedFrom}", "DetailImageIsCircular": false, "OnPress": "/QA_DigiLab/Actions/NavToTestCBOSample.action", "Styles": { "Title": "container", "BackgroundColor": "objectCardBG" }, "_Type": "Control.Type.ObjectCard" }, "Search": { "Enabled": true }, "Layout": { "LayoutType": "Vertical" } } ] } ], "_Type": "Page", "_Name": "ManualSampleDetails", "Caption": "CBO Sample", "PrefersLargeCaption": true, "FioriToolbar": { "_Type": "Control.Type.FioriToolbar", "_Name": "FioriToolbar0", "Items": [ { "_Type": "FioriToolbarItem.Type.Button", "_Name": "ToolbarItem0", "Visible": true, "Title": "Add", "Styles": { "Button": "btnPink" }, "OnPress": "/QA_DigiLab/Actions/Nav_to_Add_New_CBO_Sample.action", "Image": "sap-icon://add", "Enabled": true, "ButtonType": "Primary", "Semantic": "Normal", "ImagePosition": "Trailing" } ] } }

entry.title: Re: REVIEW: New Layout / Features for SAP Build Apps
entry.content: The project team in the last mile of delivery found it disturbing to find a different tool on Friday. The changes are all for good cause. But in a delivery project we need to manage any change, good or bad. Such changes impact, in short term, the schedule of the project.

entry.title: Vendor Upload File in Ariba Network
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a question regarding the use of vendor upload file in Ariba Network. Although we bulk upload the vendors in the Vendor Upload file in Ariba Network, we still need to invite the suppliers through the TRR (Trading Relationship Request) manually or through Quick Enablement. What exactly is the use of Vendor Upload File in this case, how is this data helping us in the Supplier Enablement process. 

Can someone please share your knowledge or experience around this?

Thanks,
Velu

entry.title: Runtime error BCD ZERO DIVIDE with International simulation payroll
entry.content:
An exception occurred that is explained in detail below.
The exception, which is assigned to class 'CX_SY_ZERODIVIDE', was not caught in
procedure "FUZITAX" "(FORM)", nor was it propagated by a RAISING clause.
Since the caller of the procedure could not have anticipated that the
exception would occur, the current program is terminated.
The reason for the exception is:
In the current program "RPCALCX0", an arithmetic operation ('DIVIDE',
'/', 'DIV' or 'MOD') with a type P operand attempted to divide
by 0.

 

Division by 0 (type P) in program "RPCALCX0"

 

 
Program SAPLZTM_TAX
 
ZTAX_REDUCT   .  .   :  : 00000088
2009999123110        20090701\0䔀P\x0C00\0餀香ಐ\x0004\x000C
ZTAX_SLABS   .  .   :  : 00000096
2009999123106        20240701\0䄀\0\x0C00\0香香ಐ倃\x000C\0
PA9315   .  .   :  : 00000696
   00000000       000000000000000000000000000

entry.title: Re: Datenvolumen SAP GTS System
entry.content:
Hi,

When you are writing /SAPSLL/SPLAUD you are still using the old audit trail. You could use the optimized audit trail.  See SAP Note 2261730.
The entries in the audit trails depends, how often you screen the BPs or documents. Further variables for system data: How often do you calculate preference, how often and what do you archive, retention time of Change Logs, etc.

regards
Benjamin

entry.title: Re: Business Content Live model connection change
entry.content:
Hi,

Yes for standard content to work , we need to create the connection with the same name. You can check in the Content help document, there are few contents which are sharing the same connections, so it depends on the specific content that you are importing.

entry.title: Re: Issue with Search Functionality in Dynamic Object Car...
entry.content:
There is not automatic search support for non-OData targets.  Looking at your page def you are getting your data from ClientData.  You can still implement search but will need to use a rule for your Target and do the filtering within the rule to return the filtered search results to be displayed.

The rule can access the searchstring and based on if that is populated do the necessary filtering of your ClientData list.

entry.title: Re: Questions about Customer Onboarding Form(COF)
entry.content:
Dear PCA,

Thank you for uploading the questions to the forum. 

[Question 1]
Please use the Online COF. The offline PCE Pre Provisioning Form (PPF) has been retired. Please refer to the supporting documents from the PCA Wiki.

When creating the COF, you could find more additional supporting documents from 'Help'.

 

[Question 2]
Yes, customers can use different subnets for DEV/PROD/QA tiers. The customer should provide another IP range for DEV and QAS.

However, this will only be a logical separation, all subnets are in the same VNET/VPC. If the customer requests this before the build, it will be done free of charge for three subnets.

When creating COF, please check 'YES' if you want a different Subnet. Please provide another IP range in the S2DHO process.

 

[Question 3]
Transit Gateway Peering is supported. Please use the Network Connectivity Questionnaire - TGW tab.
Network Connectivity Questionnaire Excel file could be downloaded from the COF - 'Form Actions'.

(Online Customer Onboarding Form)

(Network Connectivity Questionnaire)


Thank you.
Best Regards, Seungwook

entry.title: Re: #Deloitte#COE- BAdI Logic to substitute a cost center...
entry.content: Hi OwenLiu, we appreciate your feedback. However, the system's substitution process doesn't allow cost center to be overwritten.

entry.title: Re: How to scrape images from Google
entry.content:
@Dan_Wroblewski  Yes that would be great.

Thank You so much!

entry.title: Is there any way to reactivate or regenerate the EWA sessions in SAP Solution Manager?
entry.content:
My solman system was down for several days, and are there ways to generate the EWA reports for the missing week? Thank you.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is there any way to reactivate or regenerate the EWA...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

There are two methods:

Method one: Access the affected managed ABAP system -> Done -> choose the canceled EWA task -> Edit -> Reactivate. Then go to the "To do" tab, choose the same task -> Edit -> Start Now. 

Method two: Generate the adhoc versions for the affected ABAP systems from solman. 2357073 - How to Create an Ad Hoc EarlyWatch Alert SAP - Solution Manager 7.2

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: sap fiori element bust indicator in table column
entry.content: I suppose you can add a custom column to the table using flexible programming model.

Best regards, M.

You can utilize the Decision artifact to build your business rules:

 

With this, you can isolate where your approval form will be routed depending on the output of the decisions you've created.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ajbnWJvVNuQ

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding: Onboarding Rule Configurations in Data Review Scenarios
entry.content:
Hi @piyushkumarag @smitajalit @Gopinath is this still achievable? As the Basic Rule Type is deprecated, there's no way to select the Context Current User in other Rule Scenarios.

Is there an updated guide for this one so that the Rule will work only for Onboarding and not for EC, like an alternative to the Context Current User?

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP nodeJS .drafts undefined
entry.content:
THanks for your reply. It showed my the reason...

As we're using storyboard, which needs  "@sap/low-code-event-handler": "^1.2.4"

my handler class is auto generated and the calls are delegated to a js file.

In those files I can't work with this.entities. So I need cds.entities and for accessing it in that way I always get undefined for <Entity>.drafts

Any idea how to overcome this?

entry.title: Is Abap a "case sensitive" language or not?
entry.content:
Hi Masters

I knew the Abap language as a non-case sensitive language. I created my programs with Z with this in mind. Also, 

Spoiler
In programming languages
Some programming languages are case-sensitive for their identifiers (C, C++, Java, C#, Verilog,[2] Ruby,[3] Python and Swift). Others are case-insensitive (i.e., not case-sensitive), such as ABAP, Ada, most BASICs (an exception being BBC BASIC), Common Lisp, Fortran, SQL (for the syntax, and for some vendor implementations, e.g. Microsoft SQL Server, the data itself)[NB 2] Pascal, Rexx and ooRexx. There are also languages, such as Haskell, Prolog, and Go, in which the capitalisation of an identifier encodes information about its semantics.  source : wikipedia.org

 

 

Is Abap a "case sensitive" language or not?

 

Thanks .

entry.title: Re: Authentication Issues occur when sending mail to outl...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

Try this guide:

https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/configuring-smtp-mail-destination

Regards,

 

-weisson

entry.title: Re: Automated currency conversion to local currencies and...
entry.content:
Hi @xavierlegarrec,

I have removed the tag.

Thank you.

entry.title: Authorization problem with /SCWM/MON or not?
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a problem with a user.
He wants to access the warehouse management monitor via transaction /SCWM/MON. However, after entering his warehouse number and the monitor he wants to display, he receives the message that he has no authorization to access this monitor. He can click the message away and if he tries again, he can access the warehouse monitor without an error message. Whenever he logs on to SAP again, the error message appears. He also has all the authorizations he needs. It only occurs for one user.

I hope I have explained it reasonably clearly.

Many thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Analytical Insights in Joule (powered by SAC), Controlled release in Q1 2025
entry.content:
I would have 2 questions:
- When Joule will be enabled in SAC, will it replace "Just Ask" ?
- Can Joule work with Datasphere models ?

entry.title: Re: Plant specific email output
entry.content:
Hello Aparna,

One possibility is, you create all those Salesperson as separate vendors and maintain their corresponding email IDs. Now link these newly created vendors to the main vendor with the Partner Function "OA".

In the message output determination, create a new table with plant as the field and default Partner function as OA in the customization and maintain the condition records in MN04 for each of these vendors linking the plant.

Please try the above and revert.

//BR,

Mohanish

entry.title: Re: Authentication Issues occur when sending mail to outl...
entry.content:
Hi @arroyoweisson,

I tried that guide also and set up like the same setting.

But still occurs that issue.

So, I followed that blog and Authentication error still occurring.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-build-process-automation-smtp-mail-destination-using-microsoft-365/ba-p/13869543

I have no idea why this issue keep occurring.

entry.title: Re: SAP Developer News, October 31st, 2024
entry.content: Hi @KevinR , do you have news when the Codejam will use the SAP Cloud SDK for AI ?

entry.title: Re: BAS Remote Extension Host Terminated
entry.content: Hi Ramin, can you please send me the ticket details? i will follow up with the team - yuval.anafi@sap.com

entry.title: Re: What is the object type of supplier invoice in SAP S/...
entry.content: Hi Ramit!

entry.title: Re: Analytical Insights in Joule (powered by SAC), Controlled release in Q1 2025
entry.content:
- When Joule will be enabled in SAC, will it replace "Just Ask" ?

This is work in progress and you would see that sometime in 2025. No, it will not replace JustAsk.

- Can Joule work with Datasphere models ?

Yes, Analytical Insights in Joule plans to support Datasphere models going forward, most likely with QRC Q2 2025.

entry.title: Re: What is the object type of supplier invoice in SAP S/...
entry.content: Sorry for my late answer, but what you wrote to us is not that we looking for for a solution. We would like to know, what is the object type code or name of the Supplierinvoice without using this Badi. Is there any other way to get this info out from our system, like a downloadable list or any application ?

entry.title: Use average rating in Canvas Report for Calculated Column
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

 

Our client requested to get an average of performance rating from each subarea.

We managed to get that average rating using canvas report as below.

 

 

Subarea A

Subarea B

Average Rating

3.01550387596899

3.01360544217687

 

 

But, our client needs more information from the average rating, where every subarea has specific range to determine whether if it’s higher, lower or within the range.

For example,:

 

Subarea A has range 3.6 – 3.99

If Subarea A’s average rating is within the range, there’s a field that describes it as “OK” / “Within the range”

If Subarea A’s average rating is below the range, there’s a field that describes it as “LOWER”

If Subarea A’s average rating is above the range, there’s a field that describes it as “HIGHER”

 

We’ve tried using Calculated Column, but since the report checked it based on each employee, it doesn’t suit our client needs.

 

Is it possible to create this report with Canvas or probably Story?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Request to host a CodeJam in Bangalore
entry.content:
Hi @nawal_mittal ,

We are planning to have a Roadshow in Bangalore related to the topics of Machine Learning and Generative AI hub. Let us know if you are interested to host CodeJam on Machine Learning. I have emailed you the details.

Best Regards,

Shilpa

entry.title: Re: SAC with BWLive (BW4HANA) - Copy and Paste to prompt/variable does not work for larger set of va
entry.content: Hello William, yes, the feedback from the ticket is, that there will be a fix with 2024.21.9. Let's hope it will be solved with this fix. Obviously the fix was in preparation well before I opened my ticket. (Time from opening ticket to answer "there is a fix which is rolled out now" was under 2h.) So it would be really great if SAP would publish notes for this. This did cost me a lot of time research, try workarounds, opening ticket etc., which could be reduced to 30 minutes if SAP would publish this as a note. And SAP would save time on having to answer the same ticket multiple times. Thanks

entry.title: Re: Questions about Customer Onboarding Form(COF)
entry.content:
Thanks.

I have more questions.

In case of 2, how wide range should customer provide for DEV and QAS? /22 or /24?

In case of 3, can I get template or sample of transit gateway peering? I want to give information which customer prepare.

entry.title: Re: What is the best practice on extending Business Partn...
entry.content:
Hi,

no I did not resolve it. SAP is being very uncooperative about this.
The first incident I raised to SAP (March 22, 2023) was closed by explaining I need to create an improvement request.

So, I created this Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence (August 3, 2023). It has been classified as 'Planned (Long-term)', which in reality means: 'We as SAP will never respond to it again'.

To draw attention to my ignored improvement request, I created an incident again (Octobre 22, 2024).

Best regards
Sascha

entry.title: SAP SE16 Tables behind MD04 StockRequirements List
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
we want to recreate the logic of the stock/requirements list (md04). To do this, we need the source data/tables (SE16) behind this process.

Can you please help us here and name the tables and their connections/links to each other to get exactly the same output in the end?

Thank you in advance 🙂

entry.title: Stock - Multiple materials - need Batch classification
entry.content:
Hi friends

There is a nice SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud App "Stock - Multiple Materials" F1595.

You can add additional SAP fields to data source MMIM_MULTIPLE_MATERIAL_MDL in section Data Source Extensions of the Custom Fields and Logic app and publish your extension: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/32da8359c8ee4e8b8e8c5e15cacba5aa/d451f280bc3646bb9c3cb0ac37acc34e.html

Unfortunately the "Classification of Batch" is not availble in this scenario.

Do you have any ideas how to create an APP with stock measures and "classification of batch"?

Thank you!
